## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss agentic pipelines, share insights from recent one-on-one conversations, and address any questions or concerns from the team.](https://fathom.video/share/CGUrzvAe7zyuW-Qe3sc-34c-iATsQc2U?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Agentic pipelines are being rolled out, offering improved article generation with built-in validation and post-processing steps](https://fathom.video/share/CGUrzvAe7zyuW-Qe3sc-34c-iATsQc2U?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)
  - [CMs should focus on building leverage by automating repetitive tasks and documenting their editing processes](https://fathom.video/share/CGUrzvAe7zyuW-Qe3sc-34c-iATsQc2U?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
  - [Cloud Projects are recommended for efficient work and to inform future pipeline improvements](https://fathom.video/share/CGUrzvAe7zyuW-Qe3sc-34c-iATsQc2U?tab=summary&timestamp=1367.0)
  - [Precise, quantifiable instructions are crucial for effective prompts and evaluation steps in agentic pipelines](https://fathom.video/share/CGUrzvAe7zyuW-Qe3sc-34c-iATsQc2U?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)

## Topics

### Trends from One-on-One Conversations

  - [Many team members have developed their own processes for completing work efficiently](https://fathom.video/share/CGUrzvAe7zyuW-Qe3sc-34c-iATsQc2U?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
  - [Opportunities exist to increase leverage by utilizing available tools, especially for repetitive tasks](https://fathom.video/share/CGUrzvAe7zyuW-Qe3sc-34c-iATsQc2U?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
  - [Some accounts still face challenges with pipeline outputs requiring significant manual editing](https://fathom.video/share/CGUrzvAe7zyuW-Qe3sc-34c-iATsQc2U?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
  - [Recommendation: Use Cloud Projects to automate repetitive tasks and inform future pipeline improvements](https://fathom.video/share/CGUrzvAe7zyuW-Qe3sc-34c-iATsQc2U?tab=summary&timestamp=1367.0)

### Agentic Pipelines Overview

  - [New pipelines work on entire articles at once, eliminating segmentation issues](https://fathom.video/share/CGUrzvAe7zyuW-Qe3sc-34c-iATsQc2U?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)
  - [Built-in validation steps ensure adherence to client requirements](https://fathom.video/share/CGUrzvAe7zyuW-Qe3sc-34c-iATsQc2U?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)
  - [Post-processing workflow includes evaluation reports and confidence scoring](https://fathom.video/share/CGUrzvAe7zyuW-Qe3sc-34c-iATsQc2U?tab=summary&timestamp=887.0)
  - [No assignment generator in the current version; separate agentic assignment generator in development](https://fathom.video/share/CGUrzvAe7zyuW-Qe3sc-34c-iATsQc2U?tab=summary&timestamp=1202.0)
  - [Average pipeline run time is 10-12 minutes, with initial runs taking longer due to knowledge base building](https://fathom.video/share/CGUrzvAe7zyuW-Qe3sc-34c-iATsQc2U?tab=summary&timestamp=1761.0)

### Prompt Libraries and Instructions

  - [Importance of building and refining prompt libraries for each client](https://fathom.video/share/CGUrzvAe7zyuW-Qe3sc-34c-iATsQc2U?tab=summary&timestamp=573.0)
  - [Critical thinking required when reviewing AI outputs to avoid compounding errors](https://fathom.video/share/CGUrzvAe7zyuW-Qe3sc-34c-iATsQc2U?tab=summary&timestamp=1516.0)
  - [Precise, quantifiable instructions are crucial for effective prompts and evaluation steps](https://fathom.video/share/CGUrzvAe7zyuW-Qe3sc-34c-iATsQc2U?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Separate projects recommended for different tasks to maintain context clarity](https://fathom.video/share/CGUrzvAe7zyuW-Qe3sc-34c-iATsQc2U?tab=summary&timestamp=1884.0)

### Research Tools and Techniques

  - [Discussion on using Perplexity and potentially Exa for industry-specific research](https://fathom.video/share/CGUrzvAe7zyuW-Qe3sc-34c-iATsQc2U?tab=summary&timestamp=2145.0)
  - [Suggestion to specify recent time frames for up-to-date statistics](https://fathom.video/share/CGUrzvAe7zyuW-Qe3sc-34c-iATsQc2U?tab=summary&timestamp=2373.0)
  - [Potential future feature to select specific research artifacts for pipeline inputs](https://fathom.video/share/CGUrzvAe7zyuW-Qe3sc-34c-iATsQc2U?tab=summary&timestamp=2297.0)

### Cloud Projects Usage

  - [Clarification on the purpose of Cloud Projects: to increase efficiency and document processes](https://fathom.video/share/CGUrzvAe7zyuW-Qe3sc-34c-iATsQc2U?tab=summary&timestamp=2437.0)
  - [Recommendation to create projects for tasks performed at least once a month](https://fathom.video/share/CGUrzvAe7zyuW-Qe3sc-34c-iATsQc2U?tab=summary&timestamp=2421.0)
  - [Goal is to reduce time spent on repetitive tasks and allow for more strategic thinking](https://fathom.video/share/CGUrzvAe7zyuW-Qe3sc-34c-iATsQc2U?tab=summary&timestamp=2580.0)

## Next Steps
